prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第66名，近年排名稳定在65–72区间；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，仅涉及预约入校政策的中性事件；抖音热度排名第92位，评价为一般，无显著负面舆情；近年无投档断档记录；应用经济学A+、工商管理A、统计学A-，财经类学科实力突出；统计学A-与物理 类招生专业（统计学类、经济统计学等）直接相关。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类2024年推荐、电子信息/通信高热推荐（76.86）、电气工程高热推荐（74.28），理工科专业热度整体偏热；本省2026年考生总人数377900人，较2025年历史类+物理类合计285688人增 加约32%，按历史比例估算物理类考生约22.94万人，较2025年17.33万人增加约32%，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动较 大、2026年计划微扩约1.9%但本省物理类考生大幅增加约32%，竞争明显加剧，在2025年基准7869名基础上预计位次前移（更难进）；预测最低位次约7908名，区间7408–8408名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (Science) was approximately 6195 → 5915 → 6780 → 10697 → 7869, with significant fluctuations; in 2024, there was a notable drop to 10697, and in 2025, it rebounded to 7869, with a fluctuation range of about 2828 places in the past two years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 7869; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 51 in both 2021 and 2022, 49 in 2023, 50 in 2024, and 53 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 54, a slight expansion of about 1.9% compared to 2025, with a very small expansion rate.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 66th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 65–72 range in recent years; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, involving only a neutral incident regarding the reservation policy for campus entry; Douyin popularity ranking is 92nd, rated as average, with no significant negative public opinion; no record of admission cut-off gaps in recent years; Applied Economics A+, Business Administration A, Statistics A-, with outstanding strength in finance and economics disciplines; Statistics A- is directly related to the Physics Category enrollment majors (Statistics, Economic Statistics, etc.).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science was recommended in 2024, Electronics/Communication is highly recommended (76.86), Electrical Engineering is highly recommended (74.28), with overall high popularity for science and engineering majors; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is 377,900, an increase of about 32% compared to the total of 285,688 for History and Physics categories in 2025; based on historical proportions, it is estimated that there are about 229,400 Physics Category candidates, an increase of about 32% from 173,300 in 2025, indicating significantly intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant fluctuations in historical rankings, a slight expansion of about 1.9% in the 2026 plan, but a substantial increase of about 32% in provincial Physics Category candidates, competition is clearly intensifying; based on the 2025 baseline of 7869, the ranking is expected to move forward (harder to enter); the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 7908, with a range of 7408–8408.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (Liberal Arts) was approximately 1492 → 1254 → 1551 → 1867 → 2112, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 858 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 2112; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 30 in 2021–2022, 32 in 2023, 31 in 2024, and 29 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 26, a reduction of about 10.3% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking in 2026 is about 66th, with recent rankings stable in the 65–72 range; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, involving only neutral incidents regarding appointment-based campus entry policies; Douyin popularity ranking is 92nd, rated as average, with no significant negative public opinion; no recent records of enrollment gaps; Applied Economics A+, Business Administration A, Statistics A-, with outstanding strength in finance and economics disciplines, providing sustained appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of finance/economics/economy majors in 2024 is differentiated and wait-and-see, overall stable with differentiation; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is 377,900, an increase of about 32% compared to the 2025 total of 285,688 (History + Physics categories); estimated History Category candidates are about 148,500, an increase of about 32% from 112,400 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 10.3%, and the significant increase of about 32% in provincial History Category candidates, competition is clearly intensifying; based on the 2025 baseline of 2112, the ranking is expected to move forward (harder to enter); predicted minimum ranking is about 1951, with a range of 1600–2302.
